results.title: Zayo announces planned CEO transition
results.description: Sowmyanarayan Sampath appointed CEO to drive the company's next phase of AI-related and enterprise growth; Steve Smith to remain on Board following retirement. #pressrelease

results.title: Ninja Offloads Professional Plus Kitchen System at All-Time Low, More Than Just a Blender With 5 Functions
results.description: If you need kitchen tools to help you prepare and whip up dinner in a flash, this is your best bet.
